systemPromptVar.info: When enabled, the system will automatically append the corresponding variable information to the end of the system prompt when sending a message.

time.tip: Time info will be appended to the end of the system prompt

location.title: Location Variable
location.tip: Location info will be appended to the end of the system prompt
location.tip2: Leave blank to use system-detected location

os.title: OS Variable
os.tip: OS info will be appended to the end of the system prompt

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.subtitle: Create and manage knowledge bases quickly
quickActions.emptyTip: You haven't created any knowledge base yet. Click "Create KB" to get started.

config.title: KB Configuration Guide
config.subtitle: Learn about KB parameters and usage
config.info: Embedding model, chunk size, similarity threshold and other parameters are set when creating a KB. Each KB can have its own configuration.

details.embeddingModel: <0>Embedding Model</0>: Converts text into vectors. Different models have different effects and dimensions
details.chunkSize: <0>Chunk Size</0>: Size of each document chunk, affecting search accuracy and context length
details.similarity: <0>Similarity Threshold</0>: Minimum similarity score of search results. Higher is more precise
details.docCount: <0>Document Count</0>: Number of document chunks returned during search, affecting answer detail

data.title: Data Management
data.subtitle: Export backup and clear KB data
data.noData: No knowledge base found. Please create one first before managing data.
data.warning: Data management actions affect all KBs. Proceed with caution. It's recommended to export backup first.

clear.title: Confirm clearing all KB data
clear.content: This will delete all knowledge bases, documents and vectors irreversibly. Continue?

export.title: Export KB Data
export.content: All KBs and documents will be exported as a JSON file for backup or migration.

createDialog.name: KB Name
createDialog.nameHelper: Give your KB a descriptive name
createDialog.embeddingModelHelper: Model used to convert text into vectors
createDialog.noModels: No embedding models found. Please configure them in settings first.
createDialog.chunkSizeHelper: Size of each chunk when splitting document (characters)
createDialog.overlapHelper: Number of overlapping characters between chunks
createDialog.thresholdHelper: Minimum similarity score of search results. Higher is more precise

backupHeader.title: Data Backup & Restore
backupHeader.subtitle: Backup your conversations and assistant data so you can restore them after switching devices or reinstalling the app

clearConfirm.title: Confirm clearing all assistants and topics
clearConfirm.content: This will delete all assistants and conversations and cannot be undone. Continue?

notion.title: Notion Integration Settings

header.title: Notion Integration Configuration
header.desc: Configure Notion integration to export conversations to your Notion database.

form.apiKeyHelper: Create an integration at https://www.notion.so/my-integrations and copy the API key
form.databaseIdHelper: Part of the ID extracted from the Notion database URL
form.pageTitleHelper: The field used as title in database, usually 'Name' or '名称'
form.dateFieldHelper: If the database has a date field, enter its name; leave blank to skip

messages.missingFields: Please fill API key and Database ID first
messages.titleFieldMissing: Title field '{{field}}' not found in database

corsTips: Web proxy is pre-configured for development, mobile app bundles CORS bypass plugin.
Note: restart dev server after proxy changes take effect.

setup.title: Setup Steps:
steps: Visit Notion Integrations and create a new integration
Copy generated API key and paste into 'Notion API Key' field
Create a database in Notion and share it with the integration
Copy database ID from URL and paste into 'Database ID' field
Confirm the title field name in database, usually 'Name' or localized version
(Optional) Enter created date field name if needed

about.title: About Us
